sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 152 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1438/2024 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1, 4, 13 & 27 3. For orders on CMA No.1439/2024 4. For orders on CMA No.1440/2024 5. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant alongwith Mr. Zulfiqar Syed, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-I, MTO, Karachi On the last date, i.e. 06.10.2025, following order was passed:- “The impugned order has been rendered in pursuance of Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Shell Petroleum Ltd. v. Federation of Pakistan and others reported as 2023 PTD 607. Learned counsel remains unable to assist as to how a contrary view could be taken by the learned Tribunal or even this Bench in view of the authority cited supra. He remains unable to assist therefore let Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone-1, MTO, Karachi be present in the court on the next date to assist.” Today learned Commissioner Inland Revenue is present and states that in view of aforementioned judgment the reference may be dismissed subject to right of appeal of the department before the Hon’ble Supreme Court. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of the learned Commissioner is appreciated. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001.

The presence and assistance of the learned Commissioner is appreciated. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
